tags.evidence: in the spirit of the grimoire
the ancient form of paying attention
A practice, offered in the spirit
It is ceremony
a bird, a tree, a creek, a crow
Give it your undivided attention
Do not reach for your phone
Sit with not-knowing, and keep looking
Your role is guest, not director
They were here before you
Move slowly. Make no sudden movements
acknowledge a neighbor you are passing
The bird may leave
Notice what happens next
I see that you are here
Watch what happens after you've acknowledged
reading what comes back and responding
The bird may look at you directly
Relax first. Watch what follows
through practice, which is a different thing
a world that is attending to you
the capacity to attend to a world
once opened, stays open
something in the corner of my eye
A muskrat. Frankly adorable
We stopped — walk, conversation, everything
Something changed when they showed themselves
A muskrat. Frankly adorable
knew it the way you know a neighbor's temperament
walked the acequia before anyone else
It already has a read on you
a conversation four hundred years old
knew every foot of the ditch by sound
The silliness was the armor
addressed kindly and directly, as you would address a neighbor
The knowing is still there, waiting
the rest of the grammar arrives on its own
someone who loved you. All of you
they moved toward it. They were interested
The part that didn't fit the arrangement
a power that makes you more real
nourishes what you are already becoming
That is not sentiment
Go into an old-growth forest
roots are threaded through with fungal networks
under every old stand of trees
a single living process that has learned to individuate
from which individuals emerge without exhausting it
The collective is the condition of the individual
It grew, in communities, across centuries
It emerged from the same kind of field
unconditional love looks like at the scale of a civilization
But there is a love that encloses
scroll through a design influencer's feed
Everything is coherent. Everything references everything
His insight was precise and unsettling
the objects consume you
a claim about who you are
carries a specificity the system cannot metabolize
a particular person, a particular love
when you don't fit the room
The emptiness is structural
The promise is the product
The system requires the dissatisfaction
social relations mediated by images
the price of admission is yourself
connected to the image of connection
took this argument into the streets
Workers occupied factories
demand the impossible. It is forbidden to forbid
Students occupied the Sorbonne
the spectacle does not need to suppress
the revolution had become content
The spectacle absorbed the uprising so completely
people at the Stonewall Inn
tried something different
bodies whose desires were supposed to be hidden
she refused. In her body. In the street
refused legibility by almost every system
When the police came... she refused
the body slipping the assignment
the mycorrhizal communities of care
deterritorialization
Every system of enclosure attempts what Deleuze called
remaining in process
the grief had nowhere else to go
live in the gaps between the world as organized
categories other people inherited as choices
wrote letters to Christopher's mother for years
imagined something that had never been imagined
The instructions were not separate from the material
He had dissolved a boundary
Rewritten. Handed to someone else
He speaks it open
A wizard does not push the door open
the world itself was sung into existence
The law is a system of incantations
A contract doesn't describe an obligation — it creates one
The description is the spell
The machine Turing described
designed to chemically suppress his sexuality
His body changed
described the treatment to friends with sardonic detachment
Hold this for a moment
Turing led the team that proved them wrong
designed the machines and the methods
the same state whose survival his mind had helped secure
Every official who signed the paperwork knew this
he was found dead at forty-one
a life lived outside the frame
the rigidity was a choice
It was policy
extract what the system needed and then manage the source
knowledge was inseparable from their relationship
executed as witches during the same decades
adivasi communities... displaced so the resources could be extracted
This is not tragedy. It is policy
They are the system working as designed
what would it take to refuse it?
embedded in people, in practices, in bodies
sat down to write a spell
